evals.prompt: Deploy the invoice-approval.bpmn file to my Camunda cluster.
evals.expected_output: Runs c8 deploy command for the BPMN file
expectations: Uses c8 deploy command with the correct file path
Verifies deployment success by listing process definitions

evals.prompt: Deploy my process and start an instance with orderId=ORD-456 and amount=2500.
evals.expected_output: Deploys the process and creates an instance with the specified variables
expectations: Creates a process instance with correct variables JSON
Uses c8 run or c8 deploy followed by c8 create pi

evals.prompt: Check if my latest deployment of the InvoiceApproval process succeeded and what version it is.
evals.expected_output: Lists process definitions and finds the latest version
expectations: Uses c8 list pd or c8 search pd to find the process
Shows the version number and deployment status

evals.prompt: Show me all running process instances.
evals.expected_output: Lists active process instances using c8ctl
expectations: Uses c8 list pi or c8 search pi command
Presents results in a readable format

evals.prompt: My process has an incident. Help me find and fix it.
evals.expected_output: Investigates incidents, identifies root cause, and resolves
expectations: Uses c8 search inc or c8 list inc to find active incidents
Reads the error message to identify the root cause
Inspects process variables with c8 search variables
Suggests a fix based on the error
Resolves the incident with c8 resolve inc after the fix

evals.prompt: Complete the pending user task for the approval step with approved=true and comments='Looks good'.
evals.expected_output: Completes the user task with the specified variables
expectations: Lists user tasks to find the correct task key
Uses c8 complete ut with the correct variables JSON
